description:
Allow phases that run shell commands (cargo test, npm run lint, etc.) rather than requiring an AI agent. This enables hybrid workflows where deterministic steps (build, test, lint, deploy) coexist with creative AI steps (research, implement, review).

Changes needed:
1. Add phase_mode field to PhaseExecutionDefinition in agent_runtime_config.rs: Agent (default) | Command
2. Add command: Option<String> to WorkflowPhaseConfig for command-mode phases
3. In daemon_phase_pool.rs: when phase_mode is Command, spawn shell command via tokio::process::Command instead of agent runner
4. Capture exit code + stdout + stderr as phase output JSON
5. Map exit code to phase verdict: 0 = Advance, non-zero = Fail (configurable)
6. Add timeout for command phases (reuse phase_timeout_secs)
7. Add tests: command phase that succeeds, command phase that fails, command phase with timeout

Example pipeline:
  - id: implementation
    mode: agent
  - id: test
    mode: command
    command: "cargo test --workspace"
  - id: code-review
    mode: agent

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/agent_runtime_config.rs (PhaseExecutionDefinition)
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_phase_pool.rs
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/workflow_executor/phase_executor.rs
title: Add command-mode phases for shell command execution without AI agent
